mentions.note: Did not have good quarter; instead recommend PWR (Quanta Services) as better alternative in same business and better-run.

Blue Halo $4.1B acquisition risk as Pentagon satellite contract faces rebid; question whether company overpaid without that contract and if stock overvalued; long-time Cramer favorite but need clarity.
AI speculative stock, loses money, unprofitable, small cap; can be your one speculation given 1-for-10 split, but pure spec and not Cramer's cup of tea.
Down 40% since 2024 split but operations improving; trading 30x earnings with positive Scott impact; better to buy here than sell despite restaurant group out of favor from oil spike.
Only $7.7B market cap despite Rao's success; 6% yield safe but earnings expected down 2026; money managers avoid stocks with declining earnings despite good dividend.
2,900-store convenience chain in small-town America with popular breakfast pizza; gas sales seem positive not negative despite oil spike; reports after close and crowd should love it.
Best-in-class assets under Michael Wirth with great yield and solid balance sheet; but stock has parabolic move — sell half or quarter Monday to lock gains despite company quality.
Discount retailer with real bargains; reports Thursday; fits working category of discount plays as long as crude doesn't go insane; should go higher.
Winning streak on numbers but stock hasn't followed; retailers rewarded this week on good earnings; reports Thursday and fit bargain category unless oil spikes to $120.
Quarter was flat-out bad; no good numbers to recommend on; can bounce but not worthwhile to chase.
Speculative stock to SELL Monday; 'I think it's a loser' from the day it came public despite liking the people involved; not worth holding.

Formula 1 Group subsidiary pullback 23% to $83 offers terrific value; Apple TV deal locked at $140M/year vs. ESPN $85M; strong Q earnings, league peace through 2030, purer corporate structure post-spinoff. Wells Fargo upgraded from underweight; 13 buy ratings Street-wide. 42x forward PE steep but cheapest on PE basis since Aug 2023 IPO; scarcity value warrants premium. Amazing opportunity before Apple upside flows.
Post-split positioning looks sensational per Jeff Marks; stock had huge move recently with short-term peak; wait for pullback to get better entry as industrials sector pulls back.
Terrific aerospace parts company; stock historically jumps when company speaks; technology presentation Tuesday; own with little risk and a lot of love — in sweet spot.

Respect CEO but can't get behind it; no growth and trying to stay away from no-growth high-yield companies as yield doesn't make up for stagnation. Steve Cahillane did Kellogg breakup well so maybe, but let's give him time.
Winner on power ball straight up move but too hot; stock has parabolic move so do some selling to lock in gains despite not disliking the company.
New management could drive rebuild after strong retail season from Burlington, Ross, TJX; reports Tuesday after close; inexpensive quality worth watching.

Phenomenal quarter and forward guidance crush bear thesis; 27% revenue growth guidance current quarter, >30% full fiscal 2027 (~$11B vs. Street $10B); data center growing 40%, interconnect >50%; AWS custom processor business doubling, firm 2028 requirements; trading <18x forward on $5 EPS outlook despite 18% pop. CEO Matt Murphy proved 'he is the signal' after negatives were noise; much more upside ahead.

Most important report this week; stock cut in half from $345 peak due to data center build-out debt concerns and OpenAI Texas project uncertainty; need clarity on profitability timeline and Cerner sale.
Very good company, same business as ACOM but much better run; preferred alternative.
Great time to upgrade position ahead of GTA 6 release; recent dip to under $200 good entry; buy some here, pull trigger on rest if falls below $200.
Bargain offering with real bargains; reports Thursday; fits working category if oil stays reasonable; discount player set to go higher.
Should work for bulls; benefits from elevated oil prices; PCE data Friday may boost energy sector sentiment.
